seo.title: Express Towing Inc. | 24/7 Towing & Roadside Assistance in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Fast, professional towing and roadside assistance in Dallas. Call (972) 234-4400 for 24/7 emergency towing, flatbed, jump starts, and more.

hero.headline: 24/7 Emergency Towing & Roadside Assistance
hero.subheadline: When you're stranded, we're here. Fast response, fair prices, and professional service you can count on.

featureSections.title: Emergency Towing When You Need It Most
featureSections.body: Our team is on standby 24/7 to handle any breakdown or accident. We prioritize your safety and get you back on the road quickly.
bullets: Fully equipped flatbed and light-duty tow trucks
featureSections.cardBody: No matter the time or weather, our dispatchers are ready to send help your way.

featureSections.title: Roadside Assistance & More
featureSections.body: Beyond towing, we offer jump starts, tire changes, fuel delivery, and lockout services. One call solves it all.
bullets: Battery jump starts and tire changes
Winching and recovery for stuck vehicles
featureSections.cardBody: From flat tires to full tows, we handle every roadside need with professionalism.

whyChooseUs.title: 24/7 Availability
whyChooseUs.description: Our team is always ready to respond, day or night, weekends and holidays.

whyChooseUs.title: Fair & Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees. We provide upfront quotes so you know exactly what to expect.

whyChooseUs.title: Professional Operators
whyChooseUs.description: Our drivers are trained, licensed, and committed to safe handling of your vehicle.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: We know Dallas streets and highways, ensuring the fastest route to your location.

testimonials.quote: They arrived in under 20 minutes and had me on my way. Very professional and friendly.

cta.headline: Stranded? We're Ready to Help.
cta.subheadline: Call us now for immediate assistance or request a free quote online.

servicesPage.intro: At Express Towing Inc., we offer a full range of towing and roadside assistance services in Dallas. Whether you need a light-duty tow, jump start, or fuel delivery, our team is available 24/7 to get you back on the road.

services.title: Emergency Towing
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable towing for cars, trucks, and SUVs – anytime, anywhere in Dallas.
services.longDescription: Our emergency towing service is available 24/7 to assist with breakdowns, accidents, or any situation where your vehicle needs to be moved. We use modern flatbed and wheel-lift trucks to ensure safe transport.

process.title: Call or Request Online
process.description: Contact our dispatch team via phone or online form. Provide your location and vehicle details.

process.title: We Dispatch the Nearest Truck
process.description: Our system routes the closest available operator to your location for fastest service.

process.title: Safe Towing to Your Destination
process.description: We carefully load your vehicle and tow it to your preferred shop or location.

faqs.question: How much does emergency towing cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on distance and vehicle type. We provide a free upfront quote before towing.

faqs.question: Do you tow motorcycles?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can tow motorcycles using specialized equipment. Call us for details.

services.title: Roadside Assistance
services.shortDescription: Jump starts, tire changes, fuel delivery, and lockout help – 24/7.
services.longDescription: Our roadside assistance covers common breakdowns: dead batteries, flat tires, empty fuel tanks, and locked keys. We arrive quickly with the tools and supplies needed to get you moving again.
benefits: Spare tire installation and minor repairs

process.title: Describe Your Issue
process.description: Tell our dispatcher what happened – we'll send the right equipment.

process.title: Service on Site
process.description: Our technician arrives and performs the needed service, usually within 30 minutes.

process.title: You're Back on the Road
process.description: We ensure your vehicle is safe to drive before leaving.

faqs.question: Do you provide fuel for diesel vehicles?
faqs.answer: Yes, we carry both gasoline and diesel. Just let us know what you need.

faqs.question: Can you unlock any car?
faqs.answer: We can unlock most vehicles, but some newer models may require special tools. Call us to confirm.

services.title: Flatbed Towing
services.shortDescription: Secure flatbed towing for luxury cars, classics, and all-wheel-drive vehicles.
services.longDescription: Our flatbed towing service is ideal for vehicles that require extra care: luxury sedans, classic cars, motorcycles, and all-wheel-drive models. The flatbed ensures no additional mileage or wear on your tires.
benefits: No tire or drivetrain wear during transport
Ideal for low-clearance or specialty vehicles
Fully insured for peace of mind

process.title: Request Flatbed Service
process.description: Specify that you need a flatbed when you call or book online.

process.title: Careful Loading
process.description: Our operator uses ramps and straps to secure your vehicle safely.

process.title: Delivered Safely
process.description: Your vehicle arrives at the destination without any additional mileage or risk.

faqs.question: Is flatbed towing more expensive?
faqs.answer: Flatbed towing may cost slightly more, but it's often required for AWD or luxury vehicles. We offer competitive rates.

faqs.question: Can you tow a motorcycle on a flatbed?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have equipment to safely secure motorcycles on our flatbeds.

services.title: Winching & Recovery
services.shortDescription: Professional winching and recovery for stuck or off-road vehicles.
services.longDescription: If your vehicle is stuck in mud, snow, a ditch, or off-road, our winching and recovery service can safely extract it. We have heavy-duty winches and experienced operators to handle tough situations.
benefits: Available for off-road and on-road incidents

process.title: Assess the Situation
process.description: Our team evaluates the environment and determines the safest recovery method.

process.title: Set Up Winching Equipment
process.description: We anchor the truck and attach winch cables to your vehicle.

process.title: Careful Extraction
process.description: We slowly and steadily pull your vehicle to solid ground.

faqs.question: Can you recover a vehicle from a ditch?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle ditch recoveries regularly. Call us with your location for a quick response.

faqs.question: Do you offer off-road recovery?
faqs.answer: We can recover vehicles from light off-road situations. For extreme off-road, please call to confirm.

about.headline: Your Trusted Towing Partner in Dallas
about.mission: To provide fast, fair, and professional towing and roadside assistance to every customer, every time.
story: Express Towing Inc. was founded in 2005 with a single truck and a commitment to helping stranded drivers in Dallas. Over the years, we've grown into a full-service towing company known for our quick response times and transparent pricing. Our team has decades of combined experience in the towing industry.

Today, we operate a modern fleet of flatbeds and wheel-lift trucks, serving both residential and commercial clients. We're proud to be a locally owned and operated business that treats every customer like a neighbor.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up when we say we will, every time.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing and clear communication – no surprises.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: We prioritize safe handling of your vehicle and our team.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Dallas and support our local neighbors.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Call us or fill out the form for a free quote. We're available 24/7.
